cases.title: Elm Street Burglary
cases.description: A burglary occurred on Elm Street last Tuesday. Several valuable items were stolen from a residence.

cases.title: Downtown Fraud
cases.description: An employee at a downtown financial firm is suspected of embezzling company funds over the past six months.

suspects.name: Alice Chen
suspects.alibi: Was at work, confirmed by security camera footage

suspects.name: Bob Harris
suspects.alibi: Claims to have been home alone with no witnesses

suspects.name: Carol Davis
suspects.alibi: Was out of town, confirmed by hotel records

suspects.name: Derek Stone
suspects.alibi: Has documented proof of being on vacation during the transactions

suspects.name: Evelyn Park
suspects.alibi: Claims the transfers were authorized by management

suspects.name: Frank Ortiz
suspects.alibi: Was working remotely from another state, confirmed by VPN logs

evidence.description: Fingerprints found on the broken window match Bob Harris
All fraudulent transactions were made from Evelyn Park's workstation
